name: SF Skills
description: Manage skills through one Skill Funnel: catalog every source (Claude/Codex/Cursor/custom/managed) → gate sources → toggle skills per scope (global/project) → resolve name conflicts, all compiled to native settings.skills[]. Plus a passive live-context HUD, forcedotcom/afv-library install, per-skill usage counters, and prune.

docs.summary: Skills manager built on the Skill Funnel: a five-tab view (Catalog / Sources / Global / Project / Conflicts) over one resolved Skill Catalog. Source Gate decides which roots Pi sees; Skill Gate toggles individual skills at global and project scope; Skill Conflict Resolution picks a winner by exclusion. Every decision compiles to native settings.skills[] (Compiled Skill Resolution) — no SKILL.md files are ever modified. A Source Registry remembers custom paths and gate state; conflicts that touch an auto-discovered default root are report-only. Plus a passive live-context HUD, forcedotcom/afv-library install, per-skill usage counters, and prune.
